PF1-C.description: Continuous panel forming line for insulated sandwich panels.

PF2.description: High-speed double-belt panel forming line for large-volume production.

AM-Series.description: Advanced roll forming line for architectural metal profiles.

RF-100.description: Standard roll forming machine for trapezoidal and corrugated profiles.

SL-500.description: High-precision coil slitting line for steel and aluminium.

truth_hints.AM-Series max material thickness: 12 mm for structural profiles, 1.2 mm for architectural cladding
truth_hints.PF1-C minimum order: Full line only — no partial configurations
truth_hints.AM-Series minimum order: Base unit required; cassettes sold separately
truth_hints.warranty_standard: 12 months parts and labour from commissioning date
truth_hints.installation_included: Installation supervision included; civil works by customer
truth_hints.spare_parts_availability: Critical spares stocked for 10 years after purchase
